summary: Auth Surgery Tests - All 20 tests PASSED. Verified complete removal of is_demo from auth system: (1) Agent/buyer login responses have NO is_demo, (2) /auth/me and /auth/session return NO is_demo, (3) Demo login uses user_id prefix convention (demo_*) instead of is_demo field, (4) Registration creates users WITHOUT is_demo, (5) get_is_demo deleted from access_control.py, (6) get_demo_filter deleted from helpers.py, (7) No dead imports in route files, (8) Canonical endpoints still work without is_demo.
critical_code_review_comments: AUTH SURGERY VERIFIED: is_demo completely removed from all auth paths
DEMO LOGIN CONVENTION: Now uses user_id prefix 'demo_*' instead of is_demo:true field
CODE CLEANUP VERIFIED: get_is_demo deleted from access_control.py, get_demo_filter deleted from helpers.py
NO DEAD IMPORTS: No get_demo_filter or get_is_demo imports found in any route file
LOGIN RESPONSE KEYS: user_id, email, name, role, token (exactly as specified, no is_demo)
CANONICAL ENDPOINTS: projects, documents, notifications, stats, team, workflows all work without is_demo
seed_data_creation: Test agent registered with unique email during registration test (test_auth_surgery_*@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth surgery complete. All is_demo references removed from auth system. Demo login now uses user_id prefix convention (demo_agent_001, demo_buyer_001) instead of is_demo:true field. Previous iterations: Phase 1 (33/33), Phase 2 (32/32), Phase 3 (20/20), Notification Contract (19/19), P1 Legacy Cleanup (33/33), P1 Corrective Pass (24/24), Auth Surgery (20/20).
